coverage_note: The bundled TAS2R14 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from TAS2R14 visual phototransduction, auditory and vestibular hair-cell mechanics, olfactory and gustatory chemosensation, somatosensory ion channels, pain, itch, temperature, proprioception, and interoceptive sensory signaling and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000212127: TAS2R14 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: TAS2R14 findings should be read against visual phototransduction, auditory and vestibular hair-cell mechanics, olfactory and gustatory chemosensation, somatosensory ion channels, pain, itch, temperature, proprioception, and interoceptive sensory signaling; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

TAS2R14 human-senses variation model is curated as a TAS2R14 marker for Human senses, sensory transduction, and sensory-neuron research context, Vision, hearing, balance, smell, taste, touch, pain, itch, temperature, proprioception, and interoception pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

TAS2R14 regulatory expression context model is curated as a TAS2R14 marker for Human senses, sensory transduction, and sensory-neuron research context, Vision, hearing, balance, smell, taste, touch, pain, itch, temperature, proprioception, and interoception pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
